IF (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $111,375,918Details
International Box Office $73,522,752
Worldwide Box Office $184,898,670
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,544,040
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,748,123
Total $3,292,163
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A girl discovers that she can see everyone’s imaginary friends, IFs, and has to decide what she does with that superpower. She decides to embark on a magical adventure to reconnect forgotten IFs with their kids.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$33,715,801 (30.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$110,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,041 opening theaters/4,068 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $117,776,830

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 17th, 2024 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: May 8th, 2024 (Wide), released as If (Switzerland (French Speaking))
May 8th, 2024 (Wide), released as Blue & Compagnie (France)
May 8th, 2024 (Wide), released as If (Belgium)
May 8th, 2024 (Wide) (Switzerland)
May 9th, 2024 (Wide), released as IF: Amigos Imaginários (Portugal)
Video Release: June 18th, 2024 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for thematic elements and mild language.
(Rating bulletin 2832 (cert #54805), 5/1/2024)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Filming location (city or town): New York, NY
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): New York, United States

Plot point: Imaginary Friend
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Maximum Effect , Paramount Pictures, Sunday Night
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
